chunks.title: Moses prepares the tablets
chunks.reason: Narrative account of Moses carving new stone tablets and ascending Mount Sinai.

chunks.title: God reveals His name and Moses worships
chunks.reason: Divine self-revelation followed by Moses' prayerful response.

chunks.title: The Covenant Code
chunks.reason: Divine instructions regarding the covenant, conquest of Canaan, and religious festivals.

chunks.title: Writing the covenant
chunks.reason: Narrative transition where Moses writes the words and fasts for forty days.

chunks.title: Moses' radiant face
chunks.reason: Description of Moses' shining countenance and the use of the veil.
